title: pittosporum senacia subsp. coursii
intro: Pittosporum senacia subsp. coursii, also known as the Yellow Pittosporum, is a plant species within the Pittosporum genus, characterized by its yellow flowers and oval-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Pittosporum senacia subsp. coursii include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Pittosporum senacia subsp. coursii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
